name: us500_ema_pullback_trend_m15
hypothesis: US500 exhibits persistent intraday trends during US cash session; pullbacks to a fast EMA within an established trend (slow EMA slope + ADX) offer better risk/reward than breakout entries and avoid chop.

regime_filter.description: Only take pullbacks when trend strength is present; ADX<20 likely mean-revert or chop.

entry_rules.long: EMA50 > EMA200 and EMA50 slope positive over last 10 bars; price pulls back to touch or cross below EMA20 then closes back above EMA20; RSI(7) crossed up from <40.
entry_rules.short: Mirror: EMA50 < EMA200, negative slope, pullback above EMA20 then close back below, RSI(7) crossed down from >60.

exit_rules.time_stop: Close after 24 bars (6 hours) if neither hit
exit_rules.trailing: After +1R, move SL to entry; after +1.5R, trail at EMA20
